form.sourcePlaceholder: Gist hash, URL, GitHub path, or base64
form.sourceHelp: Supports: Gist hash, direct URL, GitHub path (owner/repo/branch/file), or base64:content

popup.noModsFound: No mods found matching your search.
popup.gistHashPlaceholder: Enter Gist hash or Gist URL
popup.gistHashHelp: Supports: GitHub Gist hash (e.g. abcdef1234567890) or Gist URL (e.g. https://gist.github.com/user/abcdef1234567890)
popup.debugModeDescription: Enable to show console logs from all mods. Disable for a cleaner console. Changes require page refresh.
popup.outfiterDescription: Locally unlocks all outfits in the outfit selector. Changes require page refresh.
popup.welcomePageDescription: Enable the welcome page to show on next page load.
popup.patchNotesDescription: View the latest changes and updates to the mod loader.
popup.errorLogDescription: Loader and mod errors only (warnings are not recorded).

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
messages.resetLocalModsConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset local mods? This will remove all official and super mods from storage and reload from disk. User-generated mods will not be affected.
messages.resetAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset the entire mod loader? This will remove ALL settings, mods, and data.

modDescriptions.Bestiary Automator: Automates routine gameplay: stamina refill, rewards, Day Care, and configurable automation.
modDescriptions.Board Analyzer: Simulates and analyzes board setups to evaluate strategies and performance.
modDescriptions.Custom Display: Performance Mode and map grid overlay; tune visuals for speed and planning.
modDescriptions.Hero Editor: Edit monster stats and equipment in-game; save and load custom setups for testing.
modDescriptions.Highscores: Richer highscores with extra stats, sorting, and room-by-room breakdown.
modDescriptions.Item tier list: Equipment stats and rankings; compare items and loadouts by tier and effectiveness.
modDescriptions.Monster tier list: Monster rankings and usage stats; sortable tiers and performance metrics.
modDescriptions.Setup Manager: Save, load, and manage multiple team setups per map with custom names.
modDescriptions.Team Copier: Share setups as JSON or links; optional seeds for replays; recent history.
modDescriptions.Tick Tracker: Tracks ticks per session (optional ms), with history and copy for speedruns.
modDescriptions.Turbo Mode: Speed up gameplay with customizable multipliers and tick display for testing and grinding.
modDescriptions.Battle Helper: Fetch another player profile and temporarily replace your sandbox creatures/equipment with one-click restore.
modDescriptions.Autoseller: Sells or squeezes creatures by gene thresholds; session widget for gold, dust, and counts.
modDescriptions.Autoscroller: Automates summon scroll usage to hunt target creatures; tiers, stop conditions, and rate-limited speed.
modDescriptions.Better Analytics: DPS in the impact analyzer plus sandbox panel: units, battle log, filters, and fight speed control.
modDescriptions.Better Bestiary: Bestiary sell modal: Creature Selector presets and temporary Overlays (Maxed, Sealed, Shinies) for duplicate bulk-sell when you already have shiny and/or awaken keepers per species.
modDescriptions.Better Boosted Maps: Automates daily boosted map farming with mod coordination and configurable setups.
modDescriptions.Better Cauldron: Search and filter monsters in the Monstrous Cauldron, including by rarity.
modDescriptions.Better Exaltation Chest: Auto-open chests, filter equipment, disenchant unwanted gear, with dust stats.
modDescriptions.Better Forge: Arsenal management, batch disenchant, search, and type/tier filters with live dust tracking.
modDescriptions.Better Highscores: Live tick and rank leaderboards for the current map with medal styling.
modDescriptions.Better Hy'genie: Quantity inputs, smart fusion ratios, and improved fusion UI for Hy'genie.
modDescriptions.Better Rune Recycler: Automates rune recycling with batch cycles, validation, and gold/stat tracking.
modDescriptions.Better Setups: Setup labels (Farm, Speedrun, etc.), edit from the setup UI, Configurator integration.
modDescriptions.Better Tasker: Quest automation: open log, accept tasks, navigate maps; pauses when claims are ready.
modDescriptions.Better Teleporter: Enhances the in-game teleporter map selection dialog.
modDescriptions.Better Yasir: Bulk buy and sell at Yasir with live pricing and confirmation prompts.
modDescriptions.Cyclopedia: Monster and equipment databases, player profiles, season rankings, and RunTracker integration.
modDescriptions.Dice Roller: Auto-rolls dice for stat rerolls until your target stats are reached.
modDescriptions.Challenges: Random challenge runs with map/creature rolls, scoring, leaderboards, and replay sharing.
modDescriptions.Guilds: Create guilds with roles, encrypted chat, invites, and a guild browser.
modDescriptions.Hunt Analyzer: Autoplay session stats: gold, dust, drops, summaries, and export.
modDescriptions.Raid Hunter: Raid automation: detect and join raids, setup, autoplay, stamina, and queues.
modDescriptions.Manual Runner: Repeats manual runs until victory, target S+ rank, or max floor; stats and replay copy.
modDescriptions.Awaken Tracker: Tracks per-map awaken gene progress with live stat deltas, event logs, and pause-on-cap.
modDescriptions.Depot Manager: Creature and equipment depot rows, favorites, and quick send-to-depot from the bestiary.
modDescriptions.Stamina Optimizer: Starts or stops gameplay at min/max stamina; coordinates with other farming mods.
modDescriptions.Quests: Quest tracking, NPC dialogs, quest items, and Firebase-backed progress.
modDescriptions.VIP List: Track favorite players with profiles, sortable stats, and Cyclopedia links.
modDescriptions.defaultDescription: Enhance your Bestiary Arena experience with {name}.

depot.label: Depot
depot.tooltip: Show creatures stored in the depot

shiny.label: Already Shiny
shiny.tooltip: Selects unlocked non-shiny duplicates for species where you already have a shiny. Locked creatures are skipped.

awakened.label: Already Awakened
awakened.tooltip: Selects unlocked non-awaken duplicates for species where you already have an awakened creature. Locked creatures are skipped.

both.label: Already A/S
both.tooltip: Selects unlocked copies for species where you already have a shiny awaken keeper (tier 6 or level 50+). Locked creatures are skipped.

depotMultiselector.label: Depot multiselector
depotMultiselector.tooltip: Custom selection for any creature, including locked. Transfer multiple to or from the depot.

betterBestiary.sendCreaturesToDepotTooltip: Send selected creatures that are not in the depot
betterBestiary.removeCreaturesFromDepotTooltip: Return selected depot creatures to the bestiary

betterUI.showAdvancedStatsOnHover: Show genes and equipment on hover
betterUI.shinyEnemiesWarning: Warning: This feature may impact performance during battles due to continuous sprite monitoring. Disable if you experience lag.
betterUI.autoplayRefreshWarning: Automatically refreshes the browser page when the specified time limit is reached. Useful for long autoplay sessions to prevent memory issues.
betterUI.autoplayRefreshTimerModeWarning: Autoplay session: Tracks the session widget timer (resets with each new session). Internal timer: Independent stopwatch (more reliable, starts when autoplay begins). Both: Refreshes when whichever timer reaches the threshold first.
betterUI.persistAutomatorAutoRefillWarning: When enabled, Bestiary Automator's Autorefill Stamina setting will persist across page refreshes. Use with caution.
betterUI.useApiForStaminaRefill: Use Game State for Stamina Refill
betterUI.useApiForStaminaRefillWarning: Uses Game State API instead of DOM clicks for faster, more reliable refills. Works in background tabs. Uses lowest tier potions first. Warning: There is a risk of getting rate limited.
betterUI.disableAutoReloadWarning: Prevents automatic page reloads from Raid Hunter and Better Tasker.
betterUI.disableQuestHelpersWarning: Hides quest tile highlight and tutorial arrow overlays. Quest tile interactions still work via right-click.
betterUI.alwaysOpenHuntAnalyzerWarning: Automatically opens the Hunt Analyzer panel when starting new games. Only works if Hunt Analyzer mod is loaded.
betterUI.modCoordinationWarning: Warning: Do not change any values unless you know what you are doing. Mod coordination settings affect how mods interact with each other and incorrect values may cause unexpected behavior.
betterUI.modCoordinationDescription: Adjust mod priorities to control which mods run first. Higher priority = runs first (0-255).
betterUI.modCoordinationNotAvailable: Mod Coordination system not available. Please refresh the page.
betterUI.modCoordinationNoMods: No mods registered yet. Mods will appear here after they register with the coordination system.
betterUI.modCoordinationResetAllTooltip: Reset all mod priorities to their default values
betterUI.modCoordinationChangesInfo: Changes take effect immediately. Refresh page to see all mods if some are missing.
betterUI.huntPersistTooltip: Saves all Hunt Analyzer data and automatically reopens the panel after page refresh. This includes battle statistics, loot data, and UI state.
betterUI.huntIncludeCreatureSellTooltip: Adds each dropped creature's sell value to Hunt Analyzer Gold and Gold/h. Disable this to only count direct loot gold.
betterUI.huntIncludeDragonPlantCollectTooltip: Shows Dragon Plant collected gold in Hunt Analyzer tooltip and summary details. Disable to hide Dragon Plant collect details.
betterUI.huntIncludeDisenchantedEquipmentsTooltip: Adds dust from disenchanted equipment to Hunt Analyzer Dust and Dust/h. Disable to only count direct loot dust.
betterUI.huntVisibilityDesc: Choose which elements to show or hide in the Hunt Analyzer live display section.
betterUI.antiIdleTooltip: Prevents browser idle timeout by playing a muted audio loop. The audio is completely silent and won't disturb your browsing.
betterUI.refreshOnMismatchTooltip: Automatically refresh the browser when a server/simulation mismatch is detected
betterUI.tblLeagueNotJoined: Join the event competition to submit new floor times after you join.
betterUI.tblLeagueNoRuns: No runs yet for this floor. ({ticks} ticks)
betterUI.tblLeagueSummaryHint: Compete on floor ticks for each ascension floor. Only new runs after joining count.
betterUI.tblLeagueJoinPrompt: Join the event competition to submit your floor times to the community leaderboard.
betterUI.tblLeagueNoRunYet: No event run yet — complete a floor run after joining ({ticks} ticks)
betterUI.tblLeagueLoadError: Failed to load the Event Competition. Please try again.
betterUI.tblLeagueRankNoRuns: No rank runs yet for this floor.
betterUI.tblLeagueRankNoRunYet: No event rank run yet — complete a floor run after joining
betterUI.hotkeyCaptureTitle: Click, then press a key (Del or Backspace clears)
betterUI.disableRunTrackerWarning: Tracks and stores your local run data (speedruns, rank points, and floor progress) for each map. Data is stored locally in your browser and can be exported/imported in the Backup tab.
betterUI.alwaysNavigateMaxFloorWarning: After map navigation, set floor to your highest completed floor on that map.
betterUI.autoHideNonShinyNonAwakenedMonstersWarni: Hides non-shiny, non-awakened creatures and all gazers on your Profile page. Runs when Mod Settings loads and whenever you enable this setting.
betterUI.hideNonShinyNonAwakenedMonstersButton: Hide non-shiny, non-awakened monsters and gazers
betterUI.firebaseBestRunsUploadTooltip: Upload your best runs to Firebase with password encryption. Other players can fetch and download your runs using your player name and password. Runs are encrypted client-side before upload, ensuring privacy. You can also download runs as .txt files with $replay links for easy sharing.
betterUI.firebaseAutoUploadRunsLabel: Auto-upload when new best run is recorded
betterUI.firebaseUploadRegionsDesc: Choose which regions are included in Firebase uploads. All regions are enabled by default.
betterUI.firebaseUploadOtherMapsRegionTooltip: Runs that could not be matched to a normal game region — for example legacy data, event/raid maps, or maps saved before region info was available.
betterUI.firebaseRunsPasswordRequiredTooltip: Please set a password (5-20 characters) first
betterUI.firebaseRunsPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 5 characters
betterUI.firebaseRunsPasswordMaxLength: Password must be at most 20 characters

Enter player name and password:
Format: PlayerName:Password

Example: MyPlayer:test123

autoseller.warningSellAll: This will sell ALL creatures from your inventory!
autoseller.warningSqueezeAll: This will squeeze ALL creatures from your inventory!
autoseller.tooltipSellAll:
The script will sell all creatures in your inventory that are:
- Unlocked creatures,
- Level 10 or below (52251 experience),
- Not in daycare,
- Not shiny.
autoseller.tooltipSqueezeAll:
The script will squeeze all creatures in your inventory that are:
- Unlocked creatures,
- Within the specified gene range,
- Not in daycare,
- Not shiny.
autoseller.summarySelling: Selling creatures with genes between {min} and {max} if count ≥ {minCount}.
autoseller.summaryCreatures: {count} creature{plural} will be auto{type} if count ≥ {minCount}.
autoseller.summarySqueezingFromRewards: Squeezing creatures with genes between {min} and {max}.
autoseller.tooltipUpgradeLadder: Upgrade ladder: keeps 5/4/3/2 per gene band from full inventory; excess is sold/squeezed.
autoseller.dontAutoSellSealedCreature: Don't sell or devour sealed creature
autoseller.autoInjectWarningTooltip: Auto-inject first tries sealed creatures into awakened same-creature targets (costs gold), then auto-sell/devour only if genes do not increase the awakened creature.
autoseller.tooltipResultSqueeze: candidate for auto-squeeze (if other squeeze rules match)
autoseller.tooltipResultSell: candidate for sell/devour (if other sell rules match)
autoseller.tooltipInjectPriority: Priority: auto-inject runs first, then sell/devour only if genes do not improve the awakened target.
autoseller.tooltipHumanKeep: In Keep, this creature is left alone.
autoseller.tooltipHumanSqueeze: This creature can be auto-squeezed if your squeeze rules match.
autoseller.tooltipHumanSell: This creature can be sold/devoured if your sell rules match.

raidHunter.autoFloorTooltip: Auto: Starts at floor 1, advances on victory until the selected max floor (10 or 15), then stays there on wins. Resets to floor 0 only after 10 consecutive defeats. Victory resets the defeat counter.

helpPanel.howToPlayText: Click Randomize to roll a map and creatures, then Start to play the battle. Your score is based on ticks, grade (team size and creatures alive), and difficulty.
helpPanel.title: How challenge score is calculated
helpPanel.gradeDescription: Grade is from max team size, current team size and creatures alive (time is not used). Defeat = F, 0 points.
helpPanel.difficultyMultiplierDescription: Based on how many allies you were allowed vs how many enemy creatures (e.g. 1 v 5). Raw difficulty is the internal number that encodes how hard the setup is; the displayed/score multiplier is 10 × (raw÷1000)^{power}, so lower difficulties grant more score (steep at the low end). Shown in the summary and leaderboard (e.g. raw 100 → ~3.16×, raw 500 → ~7.07×, raw 1000 → 10×).
helpPanel.mpHowToPlayText: Click Join queue to enter matchmaking. When another player is in the queue, you are paired and both must accept. The creator rolls map and creatures; both see the same roll animation, then the battle starts.
helpPanel.mpRatingText: Matches use Elo rating (default 1000). Winning gains points, losing loses points; beating a higher-rated player gains more. The leaderboard sorts by rating, then matches played, then name. Your score in the battle (ticks + grade) decides who wins; the loser's score is 0.
